# Load necessary libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

# Remove Outliers Function
```{r}
remove_outliers <- function(x, na.rm = TRUE, ...) {
    qnt <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = na.rm, ...)
    H <- 1.5 * IQR(x, na.rm = na.rm)
    y <- x
    y[x < (qnt[1] - H)] <- NA
    y[x > (qnt[2] + H)] <- NA
    return(y)
}
```

# Load the data
```{r}

df_old <- read_csv("./results/model_evaluation_results_allData.csv")
summary(df_old)
df_old_filtered <- df_old %>%
    filter((modelname == "U-NET" & crop == "wheat") |
                 (modelname == "SegFormer" & crop == "sorghum")) %>%
    select(c(crop,collectiondate,genotype,modelname,IoU)) %>%
    group_by(crop) %>%
    mutate(across(IoU, ~remove_outliers(.x))) %>%
    drop_na()%>%
    ungroup()

df_old_filtered$genotype <- as.numeric(df_old_filtered$genotype)
df_old_filtered$transfer <- "No"
head(df_old_filtered)
summary(df_old_filtered)

data <- read_csv("./results/model_evaluation_transferLearning.csv")
summary(data)

data_filtered <- data %>%
    filter((modelname == "U-NET" & crop == "wheat") |
                 (modelname == "SegFormer" & crop == "sorghum")) %>%
    select(c(crop,collectiondate,genotype,modelname,IoU)) %>%
    group_by(crop) %>%
    mutate(across(IoU, ~remove_outliers(.x))) %>%
    drop_na()%>%
    ungroup()
data_filtered$genotype <- as.numeric(data_filtered$genotype)
data_filtered$transfer <- "Yes"
head(data_filtered)
summary(data_filtered)

df_combined <- bind_rows(df_old_filtered, data_filtered)
```

# Results Graph
```{r}
# Results Graph - Violin plot comparing IoU by crop with/without transfer
df_plot <- df_combined %>%
  mutate(
    crop = trimws(tolower(as.character(crop))),
    crop = factor(crop, levels = c("wheat", "sorghum")),
    transfer = factor(transfer, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
  )

purdue_colors <- c(
  "No"  = "#CEB888",  # gold-ish for No transfer
  "Yes" = "#555960"   # steel for Transfer
)

violin_plot <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = crop, y = IoU, fill = transfer, group = interaction(crop, transfer))) +
  geom_violin(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.8, trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), outlier.size = 0.6, alpha = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = purdue_colors, labels = c("No" = "No Transfer", "Yes" = "Transfer"), name = "Transfer") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 20), limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0.01)) +
  labs(title = "IoU distributions by Crop— split by Transfer Learning",
       x = "Crop",
       y = "IoU") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

print(violin_plot)
ggsave("./results/IoU_violin_transfer.png", plot = violin_plot, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 600)
```
